# ABOUTME: Synthetic test fixture for gitleaks detection tests (Story 9.2-001)
# ABOUTME: Contains fabricated credentials used ONLY to validate the CI scanning gate
# ABOUTME: Allowlisted in .gitleaks.toml — must NOT trip the real scan

# These are NOT real credentials — they are fabricated strings for test coverage only.
# The RSA private key block below is a crafted fake; it cannot decrypt anything.
